title: Who will Eva 08s pilot be
wikitext:
[]: Who will Eva 08's pilot be?             Quote Post by Son of Lilin » Sun Jul 08, 2012 12:30 am I think that the dual-insertion pod theory is bogus, and that the pilot of Eva 08 will be solely Rei III, with Rei II still stuck in Eva 01 with Shinji. I base this on the same lack of evidence that most Rebuild 3.0 theories are based upon. Or, there'll be a wildcard black person pilot. Perhaps. Thoughts? What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Jul 08, 2012 12:50 am How 'bout ALL of them? That's why the childrens have to be gathered together, Eva-08 was constructed to Magazord standards.

[]:             Quote Post by Son of Lilin » Sun Jul 08, 2012 1:11 am That makes way more sense than my theory. My mind has been blown. I haven't really thought about why they'd been gathered, besides maybe Kaworu telling them about Instrumentality. But how could they all fit in there? Maybe Kaworu is the pilot, but Shinji, Rei and Asuka's souls are the souls of Eva 08?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jul 08, 2012 4:10 pm It's going to be Ritsuko in a plugsuit 3 sizes too small. :)

[]: Re: Who will Eva 08's pilot be?             Quote Post by PolarisX » Sun Jul 08, 2012 9:54 pm Son of Lilin wrote: I think that the dual-insertion pod theory is bogus, and that the pilot of Eva 08 will be solely Rei III, with Rei II still stuck in Eva 01 with Shinji. I base this on the same lack of evidence that most Rebuild 3.0 theories are based upon. Or, there'll be a wildcard black person pilot. Perhaps. Thoughts? What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Jul 08, 2012 10:03 pm Probably Shinji and Rei or Kaworu. Edit: Or, gee, Rei and Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 08, 2012 10:12 pm Probably Shinji and Rei in an attempt to maintain Shinji's dream world . Or maybe pen-pen and one of his penguin followers

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Mon Jul 09, 2012 6:33 am Seele may kill you all because of this, but the pilot is... Me. Talking serious now, I think Eva 08 will be the Mass Production Evas equivalent. At the 3.0 teaser trailer, 08 appears to be in a state of "energy's ecstasy" (that halo below it is the proof). And to me it's hard to think that some pilot is inside it on these circumstances.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Mon Jul 09, 2012 7:43 am It´s going to be Anno! He must make sure the plot can mindfuck us all! In truth I have no ideia, there are just too many possibilities.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jul 09, 2012 10:04 am I think it's pretty obvious that it will be Mari's. She's the only one without an Eva... I think it's more interesting what happened to Eva 07... But that does not belong here.

[]:             Quote Post by ScottAsher » Wed Jul 11, 2012 8:00 pm Mari and Rei are the only two without Evas to pilot. And, I personally doubt Shinji and Rei are stuck inside Eva 01. They seemed perfectly fine at the end of 2, unless there's something to dispute this. I think it will be Mari, and Rei won't pilot anymore but take the role she took after her Eva was destroyed in 23 (along with Rei 2, but you get what I mean) Though, speaking of 07, it could be 00 revived in the blue armor it's given in NGE. Just a thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 11, 2012 8:04 pm ScottAsher wrote: And, I personally doubt Shinji and Rei are stuck inside Eva 01. They seemed perfectly fine at the end of 2, unless there's something to dispute this.

[]:             Quote Post by ScottAsher » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:10 am Reichu wrote: The preview for Q straight-up says that Shinji and Rei are "still absorbed in the Eva". Revived from what?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:16 am ScottAsher wrote: Didn't it say stuck inside the Eva? I probably misinterpreted it then. Edit: "Unit 01 is contained with Rei and Shinji still inside!" Says the preview. Dunno, I thought it meant they were both in the cockpit.

[]:             Quote Post by ScottAsher » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:19 am Na7e wrote: It's in the same sense of episode in 19. Shinji & Rei have been reduced to LCL inside the entry plug. Shinji seems to be content in that state though, I don't know for how much longer once the Rei/Yui connection starts popping up.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:20 am ScottAsher wrote: Didn't it say stuck inside the Eva? I probably misinterpreted it then.

[]:             Quote Post by Son of Lilin » Fri Jul 13, 2012 8:01 pm Koishiro wrote: Seele may kill you all because of this, but the pilot is... Me. Talking serious now, I think Eva 08 will be the Mass Production Evas equivalent. At the 3.0 teaser trailer, 08 appears to be in a state of "energy's ecstasy" (that halo below it is the proof). And to me it's hard to think that some pilot is inside it on these circumstances.

[]:             Quote Post by michalek10866 » Sat Jul 14, 2012 7:07 am In trailer we have the quickening of eva unit-08 and its pilot. Maybe Toji returns or someone completely new.
summary:
[]: Who will Eva 08's pilot be?             Quote Post by Son of Lilin » Sun Jul 08, 2012 12:30 am I think that the dual-insertion pod theory is bogus, and that the pilot of Eva 08 will be solely Rei III, with Rei II still stuck in Eva 01 with Shinji. I base this on the same lack of evidence that most Rebuild 3.0 theories are based upon. Or, there'll be a wildcard black person pilot. Perhaps. Thoughts? What do you think?

[]:  &nbs
